meeting.track_notes: Turf. Summer course 2800m in circumference with 600m run-in. Winter course 2700m with 450m run-in. Races up to 1200m testing straight course (1200m races are occasionally run round the turn, starting on the Summer course and ending on the Winter course); beyond 1200m anti-clockwise round turn. DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets KENILWORTH WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE (Fillies)
races.race_type: For 2 yof R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SPARKLING STAR was heavily supported when finishing third behind Mystic Inferno over 1200m second time out. She should be hard to beat now that she has dropped back to 000m. WORLD OF SECRETS caught the eye late when finishing just over four lengths behind Enticement last time. She looks progressive and can improve to run a big race. Plenty first-timers o consider and it’s always worth keeping an eye on the parade ring and betting exchanges to find the runners who are doing well at home.

races.race_name: SINGAPORE POOLS TROPHY MAIDEN JUVE- NILE PLATE
races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: ROMAN BEAUTY ran a decent race on debut, with natural improvement expected from this well-bred filly, she could be the one to beat. BLACKBIRD stayed on for fourth behind highly rated Rich Man’s World. The form of that race has worked out well and he could make the required improvement. NAVASNINE did a lot better to finish second best in his second outing. It was his first run after gelding and he could be dangerous stripping fitter. There are some nicely bred first-timers in the mix so any market support may be significant.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH DIAMOND RISE MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: HILTON HEADS has run three good races in succession. He is looking for the distance and from a decent draw this time, can close to winning. PROTECTOR OF PEACE will be giv- en every chance from gate No 1, and with blinkers and a tongue-tie fitted again, he should be right there, especially as he goes 1400m. THE BIG BANG has been knocking at the door. He should also relish the distance and further. BIG DEAL is much better than his last run. The blinkers have been removed and if he gets some luck in running from a wide draw, he could trouble them.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MASTERONTHEMOON was a touch unlucky when finishing fast for second behind Phantom Man. Jockey Richard Fourie sticks with him and he can get it right this time. BOURBON KING looks progressive and ran a solid race behind Spanish Verse last time. The pair can fight it out. SPARKLING SKY, a big filly with a big action, should love the step up in trip to 1800m. If she finds herself in a good position turning for home she can earn. ROYAL INFLUENCER ran a fair race behind Ferryman, tiring over 1400m after over-racing. He now tries further and will need to settle in running.

races.race_name: RACE COAST INCENTIVES POWERED BY Hollywoodbets CLASS 5
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: BACKINTHEFASTLANE quickened up smartly to win a good race last time. The form has worked out, with Lark’s Song winning well. He has a big chance again. TRIP TO CAMELOT won well at Hollywoodbets Durbanville and his form since having been gelded has been good. The well-bred son of Trippi can only improve. SUPER VIKING was gutsy over 1400m after a rest. He will be tested over further and has more to do but does look progressive. MIDWAY is honest and can earn from a plum draw.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MARCUS AURELIUS stayed on well for second behind Future Free who went on to run another fair race. The slightly shorter trip could do the trick with top rider Aldo Domeyer in the irons from gate No 1. FERRYMAN won his maiden in style and could get better with time. IN MOTION needed his run back after a break and the step up in trip should bring out further improve- ment. CAPTAINS ALLIANCE is capable of better. He has dropped further in the ratings and could be a dark horse from stall No 1.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: GIN PALACE has changed stables and is a filly with a good reputation. Her form is fair but this 1000m looks on the short side although she should be competitive. PUSHING LIMITS can be dangerous as she enjoys racing from after a rest and carries a light weight. BLACK ERIKA rarely runs a bad race and did some good work late behind Music Of The Night last time. This 1000m might be a touch fast early in the race but she has a nice turn of foot and could get there. PEACE OF MIND is much better than her last run. This speedy filly will try and lead from start to finish.
